hero.label: WELCOME TO
hero.title: ETERNAL YOG
hero.subtitle: Journey towards your true self through YOGSADHNA

about.badge_sub: Rooted in tradition, designed for inner balance
about.heading: ABOUT US
about.text:
Eternal Yog is a space where ancient wisdom meets modern living. Founded with a deep reverence for the authentic traditions of yogsadhna, we guide seekers on a journey inward — toward stillness, clarity, and the remembrance of who they truly are.

Our practice is rooted in the classical teachings of Hatha, Raja, and Bhakti yoga, woven with the timeless knowledge of Ayurveda and Sanskrit philosophy. Whether you are taking your first step or deepening an existing practice, Eternal Yog meets you exactly where you are.

why_join.heading: WHY JOIN US
why_join.subtitle: This is not the class you attend...It's the space you return to- for balance, clarity and stillness

items.quote: Practicing with Eternal Yog has transformed not just my body but my entire way of being. The guidance is gentle yet deeply profound.
items.name: Priya Sharma

items.quote: I came looking for a yoga class and found a sanctuary. Every session leaves me calmer, clearer, and more connected to myself.
items.name: Rohan Mehta

items.quote: The philosophy woven into every class sets Eternal Yog apart. This is not exercise — it is a way of returning home to yourself.
items.name: Ananya Bose

items.quote: After years of searching, I finally found a practice that honours both the ancient wisdom and the modern seeker. Truly grateful.
items.name: Vikram Singh

text.heading: Begin Your Journey
text.body:
Ready to step onto the mat?
Reach out to learn about our classes, schedules, and how to join the Eternal Yog family.

whatsapp.label: Book via WhatsApp
whatsapp.sub: Chat with us to reserve your spot
whatsapp.message: Hello! I'd like to know more about Eternal Yog classes.

instructor.bio:
Every practice is a conversation between the body, the breath, and the self. As your guide, I do not teach yoga — I walk alongside you as you begin to reconnect with it.
My journey with yoga began early, as a natural inclination towards movement and asana during my childhood, which continued through my college years as a personal practice. What started as a physical discipline gradually evolved into a deeper inquiry.
In recent years, this journey turned inward — towards self-awareness, understanding, and the true essence of yogic knowledge. With dedicated study and formal training as an advanced yoga teacher, I now share this practice not just as a discipline, but as a way of living.
What I offer is not a curriculum — it is a living transmission. Each session is shaped by where you are, not where you think you should be.
instructor.quote_line1: Yoga is not just practiced on the mat...
instructor.quote_line2: It is a way of life we carry beyond it.
